# Art sources ledger (docs/art-asset-manifest.md, Tier F policy)
#
# One line per saved asset:  <asset_id>\t<url>\t<artist/origin if known>
#
# 2026-07: superseded by SOURCES.tsv (filename/source_url/tier/replace_priority),
# generated by tools/art_fetch.py from art/plan.tsv. This file stays as the
# free-form ledger for anything hand-saved outside the wiki pipeline.
#
# Kept even for private-use art: if the project ever goes public this is
# the replace-checklist, and the courtesy-credit list for any fanartist
# whose work inspires a commissioned Tier O piece. Tier F assets never
# ship in anything distributed, including unlisted Workshop builds
# (principles §9). Track each asset's current tier in manifest.csv.
